subject: SO-CDS PNF BB
commit_message:
SO-CDS PNF BB

This commit implements code for PNF BB for pnf
software upgrade usecase.

Issue-ID: SO-2090
Signed-off-by: tragait <rahul.tyagi@est.tech>
